data.title: The whale deposited $5 million USDC into HyperLiquid to increase its HYPE holdings, with a total floating loss of $1.3 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 7 hours ago, a whale deposited $5 million USDC to HyperLiquid to increase its holdings of $HYPE. Currently, the address holds a total of 700,214 $HYPE, with a market value of approximately $8.43 million and a floating loss of approximately $1.3 million. In addition, the whale placed an order to sell 170,234 $HYPE at a price of $16.

data.title: Canada to Implement Countermeasures Against U.S. Tariffs
data.description: According to Odaily, Canadian Prime Minister Carney announced on the afternoon of the 2nd that Canada will implement countermeasures in response to U.S. tariffs. The Canadian federal government is expected to reveal specific measures on the 3rd. Earlier that day, U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order at the White House regarding so-called 'reciprocal tariffs,' declaring a 10% 'minimum benchmark tariff' on trade partners, with higher tariffs imposed on certain partners.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Attributes Stock Sell-Off to Tech Stocks Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant stated on Wednesday evening that the recent stock market sell-off is primarily due to a significant pullback in major technology stocks, rather than the protectionist policies of U.S. President Donald Trump's administration.

In a television interview, Besant emphasized, "I am striving to be the Treasury Secretary, not a market commentator. I want to highlight that the Nasdaq index peaked on DeepSeek Day, indicating this is an issue with the Mag7 (the seven major U.S. tech giants), not a MAGA issue."

data.title: Arizona House Committee Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Arizona House of Representatives has passed two Bitcoin reserve-related bills (SB 1025 and SB 1373) in full committee. The next step will be the third reading, followed by a final vote in the House of Representatives. If successfully passed, the two bills will be submitted to the governor for signature to become formal laws.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: BTC will be “out of danger” if it can hold $76,500 until Tax Day on April 15
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes wrote that the market reacted poorly to "Liberation Day" and "If Bitcoin can hold $76,500 between now and US Tax Day (April 15), then we will be out of danger." He also reminded investors "not to be cut by volatile market conditions."

data.title: U.S. Senate Approves Bill to End Tariffs on Canadian Imports
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Senate has passed a bill with a 51-48 vote that could potentially end the new tariffs imposed by U.S. President Donald Trump on Canadian imports. However, the bill faces uncertainty as it is unlikely to gain approval in the House of Representatives.

data.title: Galaxy Digital Secures FCA Approval for Derivatives Trading License
data.description:
According to PANews, Galaxy Digital's UK subsidiary has received approval from the UK's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) for a derivatives trading license. This authorization will enable Galaxy Digital's investment banking division to conduct capital raising and investment banking services in the UK. Additionally, the UK subsidiary will support fund distribution for its asset management business.

Galaxy Digital UK is now listed under two major FCA regulatory registers. It is authorized to provide investment services under the EU's Markets in Financial Instruments Directive (MiFID) and has been part of the FCA's cryptocurrency register since 2021.

data.title: Canadian Prime Minister: Will take tariff countermeasures against the United States
data.description: Canadian Prime Minister Carney said on the afternoon of the 2nd that Canada will take countermeasures to deal with US tariffs. The Canadian federal government is expected to announce specific countermeasures on the 3rd. Earlier that day, US President Trump signed an executive order on the so-called "reciprocal tariffs" at the White House, announcing that the United States would impose a 10% "minimum base tariff" on trading partners and impose higher tariffs on certain trading partners.

data.title: Binance confirms FDUSD can be backed by 1:1 reserves
data.description: Binance officials said that according to a recently completed audit, the stablecoin FDUSD has achieved 1:1 reserve support, which means that each FDUSD is backed by an equivalent amount of US dollar assets.

data.title: Dollar Index Declines Below Key Tariff Announcement Level
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) has resumed its downward trend, falling below the level seen when U.S. President Donald Trump announced comprehensive tariffs. The latest report shows the index at 103.24, a decrease from its peak above 104 during the tariff announcement.
